form.formComment: Last start finished 2nd in a Restricted WIN H on April 10 over 460m at this track behind Inspection beaten 3.5 lengths (26.10). Fought on last time. Right in the mix again.

formComments.comment: Last start finished 2nd in a Restricted WIN H on April 10 over 460m at this track behind Inspection beaten 3.5 lengths (26.10). Fought on last time. Right in the mix again.

form.formComment: Solid performance to post a big 3.5 lengths win at this track over 460m (26.19) beating Come On Larry in Restricted WIN H on April 10. Has never missed the frame in three starts from this box. Definite chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Solid performance to post a big 3.5 lengths win at this track over 460m (26.19) beating Come On Larry in Restricted WIN H on April 10. Has never missed the frame in three starts from this box. Definite chance.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a sensational early split and led throughout to score an impressive win by 3.5 lengths over 460m at this track (25.57). Makes plenty of appeal. Go close again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Flew the lids with a sensational early split and led throughout to score an impressive win by 3.5 lengths over 460m at this track (25.57). Makes plenty of appeal. Go close again.

form.formComment: Was in the placings last time but prior to that was a strong winner after leading throughout, scoring by half a length in a Maiden FIN at Bendigo and clocking a brilliant 23.65 for the 425m trip. Has the ability and looks a key chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was in the placings last time but prior to that was a strong winner after leading throughout, scoring by half a length in a Maiden FIN at Bendigo and clocking a brilliant 23.65 for the 425m trip. Has the ability and looks a key chance.

form.formComment: Found the going tougher last start when third over 460m at this track. That followed a win two back in 23.73 beating Amron Lucy over 425m at Bendigo. In the money last time but this is a stern test.

form.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at her last three starts. Last time out finished 3rd in a Restricted WIN H on April 10 over 460m at this track behind Inspection beaten 4.5 lengths (26.19). Minor place prospects only.

formComments.comment: Form has been solid with minor placings at her last three starts. Last time out finished 3rd in a Restricted WIN H on April 10 over 460m at this track behind Inspection beaten 4.5 lengths (26.19). Minor place prospects only.

form.formComment: Strong performance to win by 3.5 lengths at this track over 460m (25.88) beating Caco Missile in Restricted WIN H on April 10. Yet to be beaten in two starts out of this box. Must be respected.

form.formComment: Hit the ground running with a fast early sectional but found one better when runner up over 460m at this track clocking 26.43. Has ability and can run well.

form.formComment: Form has been strong, including a victory two starts back. Last time out finished 3rd on April 10 over 460m at this track behind Juneau Rest beaten 4 lengths (26.46) in a Restricted WIN H. Hard to tip with any confidence.
